name: zenith
desc: Zenith: a continuous-improvement harness for long-running agent tasks. Turns Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes into a multi-agent mission orchestrator via MCP/ACP.
descFull: Zenith: a continuous-improvement harness for long-running agent tasks. Turns Claude Code, Codex, or Hermes into a multi-agent mission orchestrator via MCP/ACP.
